name: comments
description: Manage comments — creates a comment on a file. for more information, see [manage comments and replies](https://developers.google.com/workspace/drive/api/guides/manage-comments). required: the `fields` parameter must be set. to return the exact fields you need, see [return specific fields](https://developers.google.com/workspace/drive/api/guides/fields-parameter), lists a file's comments. for more information, see [manage comments and replies](https://developers.google.com/workspace/drive/api/guides/manage-comments). required: the `fields` parameter must be set. to return the exact fields you need, see [return specific fields](https://developers.google.com/workspace/drive/api/guides/fields-parameter), gets a comment by id. for more information, see [manage comments and replies](https://developers.google.com/workspace/drive/api/guides/manage-comments). required: the `fields` parameter must be set. to return the exact fields you need, see [return specific fields](https://developers.google.com/workspace/drive/api/guides/fields-parameter). Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.
